sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_dates (id UInt32, date_string String) ENGINE = Memory;
SELECT id, parseDateTimeBestEffortOrNull(date_string) AS parsed_date FROM test_dates;
UPDATE test_dates SET date_string = 'Invalid Date' WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, parseDateTimeBestEffortOrNull(date_string) AS parsed_date FROM test_dates;
